calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cavalry Portfolio Services, LLC. as assignee of Cavalery SPV I, LLC. as assignee of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Jose R. Gonzales, a/k/a Jose Gonzales.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 12, 2011.
Declaration of Jason Bottiglieri in lieu of live witness testimony at trial pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed on November 2, 2011, and served on defendant on October 24, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 28, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cavalry Portfolio Services, LLC. as assignee of Cavalery SPV I, LLC. as asssignee of Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against defendant Jose R. Gonzales, a/k/a Jose Gonzales, as follows:

Principal - $5,935.79.
Interest - $1,829.37.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $280.00.

Total - $8,045.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Set For Trial On Nov-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
